description: Memory handoff and lesson distillation hooks for fable-loop.

hooks.prompt: When beginning or resuming fable-loop work this session, read the short map at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/memory/handoff.md first — it is the authoritative current state (goal, lane status table, next action). If that file is missing or still the empty template, no loop is active; do nothing.

A subagent just finished. If it resolved a failure during the fable loop, distill the resolution into one or two lines ('Symptom X caused by Y, fixed by Z') and append it to memory/lessons.md. Then update memory/handoff.md so the lane status table and 'Next action' reflect the new state. Keep handoff.md under ~30 lines; move any detail to its linked file.
